column1: # Strain2bScan vs StrainScan, per-sample profiling on 5 real C. acnes mock samples
# (identical input reads; each tool at its default settings). 16-core arm64 macOS.
# Re-verified 2026-06-30 with strain2bscan v0.1.0 (parallelized; default = all cores).
# Strain2bScan ~14x faster and ~7x lighter per sample. (sample1 StrainScan time includes
# process cold-start; typical ~6.8 s.) Even single-threaded, Strain2bScan profile is ~3.4 s,
# still faster than StrainScan. Memory gap is structural: jellyfish full-k-mer hash (~800 MB)
